title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Sabo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Cobra, Imu as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No one is ever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The impossible ruler!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...supposed to sit there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No individual should have the power to control the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MU* shall address two of the points being discussed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KOFF, KOFF...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And thou must answer a single question in return, cobra.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who are you...?!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I'VE HEARD THE NAME "IMU" BEFORE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: IT COULD BE A CONCIDENCE, BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ONE OF THE FIRST 20 WAS ALSO CALLED THAT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such curiosity titers on imperinence... it will not be dignified with an answer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: However, those initial queries shall be addressed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'd.' is the moniker of our ancient enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In recent times, it has cropped up more frequently. However, it is nothing but a faint echo.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those who carry the name do not even know of its true meaning now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And yet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This irritation only endures due to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: QUEEN ULI'S GRAVE BLUNDER 800 YEARS AGO.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Blunder?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same can be said of those irksome scholars investigating the so-called void century...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: without that blunder, there would be no pirates chasing the poneglyphs in pursuit of treasure either...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it were not for Lili's Incompe- Tence...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...those vexing Religs would never have been scattered all over the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The release of the PONE- Glyphs was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The worst possible outcome for us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So one must wonder...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WHETHER IT WAS TRULY A MISTAKE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...or if it was actually part of some larger plan...?

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
